[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000000 1
1 10110110 5
2 10000000 1
3 01101001 4
4 11011110 6
5 01101000 3
6 01111110 6
7 01001000 2
